payload.query: There are two dominant models of democratization - modernization and distributive approaches. Summarize and critique the most important elements of each approach, focusing on assumptions, hypotheses, and democratic outcomes. Contrast their arguments with other theories about democratization. Is one more useful? Is it possible to combine these approaches?
